title: boesenbergia eburnea
intro: Boesenbergia eburnea, also known as the yellow ginger or lesser galangal, is a type of plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Boesenbergia eburnea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and capsules, which are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
